_readme: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values. config.json should be gitignored.

bitwarden._note: session_env_vars are checked in order; first non-empty value wins. Falls back to bw unlock --raw if none set.

env._note: Set these environment variables before running. Values are the env var names, not the credentials themselves.

file._note: File contains a single line: your_email@example.com:your_app_password

defaults.subject: Claude Notification
defaults._email_to_note: Default recipient when --to is not specified and destination is not SMS.

sms_gateway_domains._note: Addresses matching these domains are treated as SMS: plain text only, no HTML.
